name: agent-eval
description: Deterministic, static, transcript-first agent usage evaluation with public-safe artifacts.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-runtime-assets.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm benchmark && pnpm scan:artifacts artifacts/benchmark && pnpm build && pnpm smoke:dist
scripts.check:release: node scripts/check-clean-worktree.mjs --require-main --require-upstream-clean && pnpm exec tsx scripts/verify-release-manifests.ts artifacts/final-qa-codex artifacts/final-qa-claude artifacts/final-qa-pi && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm benchmark && pnpm scan:artifacts artifacts/benchmark artifacts/final-qa-codex artifacts/final-qa-claude artifacts/final-qa-pi && pnpm build && pnpm smoke:dist && node scripts/check-clean-worktree.mjs --require-main --require-upstream-clean
